title: Is the New Music Video Safe HERE BE SPOILERS
display_title: Is the New Music Video Safe HERE BE SPOILERS
wikitext:
[]: Is the New Music Video Safe? [HERE BE SPOILERS] Post by NAveryW » Fri Nov 23, 2012 3:38 pm Watch at your own peril and report back to me.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Nov 23, 2012 3:42 pm To quote the man, [SPOILERS AS FUCK].

[]: Post by Xard » Fri Nov 23, 2012 3:42 pm unless you consider some clips from climax safe: nope

[]: Post by Jayfive » Fri Nov 23, 2012 3:44 pm Its like the videos for 1.11 and 2.22 - lots of images, not in any order or given any context. There may however be spoilers simply based on character facial expression and/or how they appear compared to when you last saw them in 2.22 Animation is great quaking slabs of awesome though.

[]: Post by Charsi » Fri Nov 23, 2012 3:55 pm If you're trying to be spoiler free, don't watch it. Best case, it spoils you. Worst case, it spoils you with a bunch of wrong ideas.

[]: Post by Xard » Fri Nov 23, 2012 3:57 pm Charsi wrote: Worst case, it flat out misleads you.

[]: Post by Charsi » Fri Nov 23, 2012 3:59 pm Well played.

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 23, 2012 4:54 pm This shouldn't be in the main Rebuild forum at all. Go to Q and Beyond to discuss it in the preexisting trailers thread.

Article: Is the New Music Video Safe HERE BE SPOILERS
[]: Is the New Music Video Safe? [HERE BE SPOILERS] Post by NAveryW » Fri Nov 23, 2012 3:38 pm Watch at your own peril and report back to me.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Nov 23, 2012 3:42 pm To quote the man, [SPOILERS AS FUCK].

[]: Post by Xard » Fri Nov 23, 2012 3:42 pm unless you consider some clips from climax safe: nope

[]: Post by Jayfive » Fri Nov 23, 2012 3:44 pm Its like the videos for 1.11 and 2.22 - lots of images, not in any order or given any context. There may however be spoilers simply based on character facial expression and/or how they appear compared to when you last saw them in 2.22 Animation is great quaking slabs of awesome though.

[]: Post by Charsi » Fri Nov 23, 2012 3:55 pm If you're trying to be spoiler free, don't watch it. Best case, it spoils you. Worst case, it spoils you with a bunch of wrong ideas.

[]: Post by Xard » Fri Nov 23, 2012 3:57 pm Charsi wrote: Worst case, it flat out misleads you.

[]: Post by Charsi » Fri Nov 23, 2012 3:59 pm Well played.

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 23, 2012 4:54 pm This shouldn't be in the main Rebuild forum at all. Go to Q and Beyond to discuss it in the preexisting trailers thread.
